Although modern video models exhibit strong comprehension of scene dynamics, exploring multiple possible futures through full video synthesis remains prohibitively inefficient. articles.ai_summary: Researchers have developed a method for efficiently predicting motion by using long-term motion embeddings derived from large-scale trajectories. This approach significantly enhances the efficiency of video synthesis for scene dynamics.
